# .github/workflows

GitHub Actions workflows automating package deployment (GitHub Pages) and npm publication.

## Contents

### [pages.yml](./pages.yml)
Deploys blog to GitHub Pages on `main` branch pushes affecting `site/**` or `blog/**`. Builds via `node site/build.mjs`, uploads artifact with `actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3`, deploys to `github-pages` environment with `actions/deploy-pages@v4`.

### [publish.yml](./publish.yml)
Publishes package to npm on release events or manual trigger. Authenticates via `secrets.NPM_TOKEN`, builds with `npm run build`, publishes with `--provenance --access public` flags to `https://registry.npmjs.org`.

## Trigger Patterns

- **pages.yml**: `push` on `main` with path filters `site/**`, `blog/**`, or `workflow_dispatch`
- **publish.yml**: `release.types: [published]` or `workflow_dispatch`

## Concurrency & Permissions

- **pages.yml**: concurrency group `pages` with `cancel-in-progress: true`, grants `contents: read`, `pages: write`, `id-token: write`
- **publish.yml**: grants `contents: read`, `id-token: write` for npm provenance attestation

## Dependencies

- **pages.yml**: `actions/checkout@v4`, `actions/setup-node@v4` (Node 20), `actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3`, `actions/deploy-pages@v4`
- **publish.yml**: `actions/checkout@v4`, `actions/setup-node@v4` (Node 20), requires `NPM_TOKEN` secret for registry authentication
